titleStmt.title: SII 32, part 2, no. 213: original edition by S. Swaminathan
No. 213. (A.R. No. 496 of 1925.) SEMBIYANMAHĀDĒVI, NAGAPATTINAM TALUK, TANJAVUR DISTRICT.

summary.p: On the south wall, central shrine, Kailāsanāthasvāmi temple.

Incomplete. It records the endowments of a total of 143 and 145 and odd kaḻañju of gold made respectively by Ārūraṉ AmbalattaḍigaḷAr and Uṟaṭṭayaṉ Sōrabbaiyār, the queens of Uttamachōḷa for feeding the brāhmaṇa-administrators of the temple (sāśanabaddha-chaturvēdi-bhaṭṭat-tānap perumakkaḷ)The expression seems to refer to the body otherwise referred to as sthānattār.after being identified on the day of KēTTai in the month of Chittirai, the birthday asterism of Sembiyan Mahādēviyār, the mother of Uttamachōḷa alias Kaṇḍaṉ Madhurāntaka-dēvar at the temple of Kayilāśam uḍaiyār-Mahādēvar in the brahmadēya, Sembiyanmahādēvi-chaturvēdimaṅgalam in Aḷa-nāḍu created by the same dowager queen, Sembiyan Mahādēvi.
Published in S.I.I., Vol. XIX No. 405.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . kopparakesaripanmaṟku yāṇṭu 10 6- Āvatu kaṇṭaṉ maturāntakadevarāṉa śrīuttamacoḻadevarait tiruvayiṟuvāytta Uṭaiya pirāṭṭiyār śrī pirāntakaṉ mātevaṭika
ḷārāṉa cempiyaṉmahādeviyār ceytaruḷiṉa teṉkarai Aḷanāṭṭu brahmadeyam cempiyaṉmahādeviccaturvetimaṅkalattu Ivammaiy pi
rāṭṭiyār ceytaruḷiṉa śāsanabaddhaccaturvetipaṭṭat tāṉap perumakkaḷukku Ivvūr śrī kayilāsamuṭaiyamahādevar koyilile Ippirāṭṭiyār tirunāḷāṉa cittirait tirukeṭṭai nāḷ meykkāṭṭi Uṇpatāka Iśrīuttamacoḻadevar deviyār Ārūra ṉampalattaṭikaḷār Ivvūr Ūrkkallālk kuṭutta poṉ 100 4 10 3ø kaḻañcaraiye
2mā 4ṉūṟṟunāṟpattu mukkaḻañcaraiye Irumāvaraiyum Iśśānabaddhaccaturveti paṭṭattāṉap perumakkaḷukku Iśrī Uttamacoḻa deviyār nampirāṭṭiyār Uṟaṭṭayaṉ corappaiyārāṉa tiripuvaṉa māteviyār Ivvūr Ūrkkallāl kuṭutta poṉ 10 45 ṉūṟṟu nāṟpattaiṅ kaḻañce
Digital edition of SII 32, part 2, no. 213 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
